chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 1348 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.5442/2026 3. For hearing of main case 07.04.2026 Malik Altaf Hussain, Advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG along with SI Muhammad Afjad, FIA AHTC, Karachi. ------------------------------------ At the very outset, the I.O./ SI Muhammad Afjad, FIA AHTC present in Court submits that i. To quash the Notice dated 17.02.2026 whereby the petitioner has been associated with the enquiry relating to Bangladeshi Citizens. ii. Restrain the respondents from arresting the petitioner without prior permission of this Hon’ble Court till final adjudication of the captioned matter. iii. Grant cost of the petition and any other relief which this Hon’ble Court deems just and proper in the circumstances of the cse. At the very outset, Ms. Shazia Hanjrah, learned DAG, submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. She after going through the record, ensures that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the above statement sought disposal of instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment.

She after going through the record, ensures that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the above statement sought disposal of instant petition with directions to the official respondents to provide necessary protection to the petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. In view of the statement rendered by learned DAG, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause them harassment. The instant petition along with listed application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
